creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Sounds like bad connectivity to the main FTP site. Try a mirror, or better 
yet, bittorrent; as listed at http://www.freebsd.org/where.html 

If you're still having problems after that, please ask on 
freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org 


Good luck,
